auth._comment: Leave bootstrap_admin out (and require_account false) to run in no-account mode: anyone reaching the dashboard acts as admin until the first account is created from the Users tab. Set require_account true to force login; if no account exists at startup a random admin password is generated and printed to the server log.

_comment_geo: IP geolocation powers the world map. enabled defaults to true; set it false to disable all external lookups. endpoint overrides the free provider URL template ({ip} is substituted) and may be left out to use the built-in ip-api.com default. The enabled flag is also runtime-tunable from the Settings panel.
_comment: The fields below are runtime-tunable: they are only read on the very first launch (to seed the runtime_config row) and edited via the Settings panel thereafter.

sources._comment: Example dir source: scans /var/log/nginx for access*.log* files (live tails plain files, one-shot imports .gz archives when read_compressed is true).
sources.name: nginx-dir
